name: cv-spider-v1-google-api
description: An ASP.NET Web Forms application for automated web scraping and email extraction from Google search results. Built in 2012 as a proof-of-concept for lead generation using SERP scraping, LINQ-to-SQL ORM, and SQL Server database storage with duplicate detection and rate limiting.
author: Or Assayag <orassayag@gmail.com>

engines.note: This is a .NET Framework 3.5 project, not Node.js

scripts.info: echo 'This is a .NET Framework project. Build using Visual Studio or MSBuild.'
scripts.build: echo 'Please build this project using Visual Studio or: msbuild /p:Configuration=Release'
scripts.start: echo 'Please run this project through IIS or Visual Studio Development Server'

meta.warning: This project uses deprecated scraping techniques. Use official APIs for production systems.
